About the Home

Executive Colonial on 5 Scenic Acres

Set in the prestigious Deer Run community of Deerfield and located within the highly regarded Whitesboro School District, this exceptional executive colonial offers a rare blend of space, privacy, and natural beauty without sacrificing convenience.

Nestled on 5.14 picturesque acres, the property is a true retreat, complete with a tranquil stream flowing through the rear of the land — a serene backdrop that's hard to find at this price point. With approximately 3,716 square feet of living space, this 5-bedroom, 4-bathroom home is designed for both everyday comfort and upscale entertaining.

The fully finished walk-out basement adds incredible versatility, offering a dedicated home gym, game room, and the ideal setup for an in-law suite or guest quarters. Ideally positioned, the home is closer to Wynn Hospital than properties in New Hartford, and just minutes from the NYS Thruway and the Utica train station.

Property Highlights

  • 5 bedrooms & 4 full bathrooms
  • ~3,716 sq ft of living space
  • 5.14 acres with a tranquil stream
  • Prestigious Deer Run community
  • Whitesboro School District
  • Finished walk-out basement
  • Home gym & game room
  • In-law / guest suite potential
  • Minutes to Thruway & Utica train
